page_metadata.biotools__summary:
An Imaging Genomics Software Tool to Interrogate Multiomics Networks for Relevance to Radiography and Histopathology Imaging Biomarkers of Clinical Outcomes.

Imaging-AMARETTO: tools for interpreting multi-omics networks for relevance to radiographic and histopathology imaging-derived biomarkers of clinical outcomes.

The *AMARETTO framework for network biology and medicine: linking diseases, drivers, targets and drugs via graph-based fusion of multi-omics, clinical, imaging and perturbation data.

NIH NCI CBIIT ITCR Cancer Data Science Pulse Blog.

Regulatory Network Inference and Driver Gene Evaluation using Integrative Multi-Omics Analysis and Penalized Regression.

Integrating an increasing number of available multi-omics cancer data remains one of the main challenges to improve our understanding of cancer.
